response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive exposure to cloud platforms (AWS), and relevant work with agentic workflows and MCP, aligning well with core requirements; however, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders, which are critical for the staff-level role.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven track record in cloud-native development using AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes across multiple roles
Strong technical leadership through workshops, open-source contributions, and mentoring in TDD and CI/CD practices
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions; most AI-related work is recent and implicit
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization techniques
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI system integration projects
